name: Evocation
short_description: !!!THIS GAME WILL BE REMOVED FROM STEAM DUE TO GAME BEING BAD AND NEW UNITY POLICY!!!Evocation - is a colorful, hardcore platformer that will make you sweat. The main thing you need to overcome all obstacles is perseverance and reaction.
detailed_description:
Description

!!!THIS GAME WILL BE REMOVED FROM STEAM DUE TO GAME BEING BAD AND NEW UNITY POLICY!!!



Evocation - is a colorful, hardcore platformer that will make you sweat. The main thing you need to overcome all obstacles is perseverance and reaction. You will be placed in the simulation to go through the database protection system, you will need to rely on your speed and will.
Gaps, walls, platforms, lasers, spinning traps and a lot more.
You're a hack program after all..

Features

    6 colorful and challenging levels to play with your nerves
    Original soundtrack for each level
    Additional gain and modification of basic mechanics

Controls

    W A S D - move
    SHIFT - sprint. (hold SHIFT for more boost/SHIFT only - walk)
    SPACEBAR - jump. (hold for higher jump)
